blocker: Windows target was unreachable over Tailscale/SSH during this validation window.

commands.command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o UserKnownHostsFile=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/tze_hud_known_hosts -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o ConnectionAttempts=1 -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home hudbot@tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net "whoami"
commands.output: ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out

commands.command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o UserKnownHostsFile=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/tze_hud_known_hosts -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o ConnectionAttempts=1 -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home tzeus@tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net "whoami"
commands.output: ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out

commands.command: timeout 10 bash -lc 'nc -vz tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net 22; nc -vz tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net 50051; nc -vz tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net 9090'

timeout 10 bash -lc 'getent hosts tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net; tailscale status --peers=false 2>/dev/null || true; tailscale ping --timeout=5s tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net 2>/dev/null || true'
commands.output:
100.87.181.125  tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net
100.99.218.4  tzeusy  userid:<redacted>  linux  -

# Health check:
#     - systemd-resolved and NetworkManager are wired together incorrectly; MagicDNS will probably not work. For more info, see https://tailscale.com/s/resolved-nm
ping "100.87.181.125" timed out

commands.command: for i in 1 2 3; do echo retry=$i; timeout 8 tailscale ping --timeout=5s tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net || true; timeout 8 ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o UserKnownHostsFile=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/tze_hud_known_hosts -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o ConnectionAttempts=1 -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home tzeus@tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net "whoami" || true; sleep 10; done
commands.exit_code_semantics: loop_completion_only; final sleep masked individual probe failures
commands.output:
retry=1
ping "100.87.181.125" timed out
ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out
retry=2
ping "100.87.181.125" timed out
ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out
retry=3
ping "100.87.181.125" timed out
ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out

follow_up_bead_draft.title: Add compositor-path diagnostic input injector for text-stream portal live validation
follow_up_bead_draft.description: Provide a runtime-supported diagnostic input injection path that enters the same windowed compositor/input pipeline as true OS pointer, wheel, focus, and keyboard events, then use it to record text-stream portal focus, drag, and scroll transcript evidence. Existing scheduled-task SendInput can move the console cursor but did not produce input:focus-*, drag:*, or scroll:output transcript events in hud-eq1m4 rerun evidence.
